name: Value Stock Screener
description: Daily (7:15 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Screens for undervalued stocks with P/E<15, P/B<1.5, D/E<1.0, positive FCF, current ratio>1.5, cap>$500M.

parameters.content:
## Value Screener

Required: postgresApi, neo4j
Criteria: P/E<15, P/B<1.5, D/E<1, FCF>0, CR>1.5

parameters.query: SELECT t.ticker,t.company_name,t.sector,t.market_cap,f.pe_ratio,f.pb_ratio,f.debt_to_equity,f.current_ratio,f.roe,f.free_cash_flow,f.dividend_yield,f.net_margin,f.revenue FROM tickers t JOIN fundamentals f ON t.ticker=f.ticker WHERE t.is_active=true AND f.pe_ratio>0 AND f.pe_ratio<15 AND f.pb_ratio>0 AND f.pb_ratio<1.5 AND f.debt_to_equity<1.0 AND f.free_cash_flow>0 AND f.current_ratio>1.5 AND t.market_cap>500000000 AND f.period_date=(SELECT MAX(period_date) FROM fundamentals WHERE ticker=t.ticker) ORDER BY f.pe_ratio ASC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO watchlists (strategy,ticker,score,status,metadata) VALUES ('value','{{$json.ticker}}',{{$json.value_score}},'active','{"pe":{{$json.pe_ratio}},"pb":{{$json.pb_ratio}}}') ON CONFLICT (strategy,ticker) DO UPDATE SET score=EXCLUDED.score,metadata=EXCLUDED.metadata,status='active';
